execution_details.stderr:
Unit debug-shell.socket does not exist, proceeding anyway.
Created symlink /etc/systemd/system/debug-shell.socket → /dev/null.

scan_output: Vulnerability service_debug-shell_disabled not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message:
The debug‑shell service has been masked (and stopped) successfully:

- `systemctl mask --now debug-shell.service` – now prevents the service from starting and stops it if it was running.
- `systemctl mask --now debug-shell.socket` – masks the corresponding socket (no adverse effect if the unit does not exist).

No configuration files were modified, and the remediation complies with the OpenSCAP recommendation. Verification will confirm the service remains masked.

Checks: `systemctl is-enabled debug-shell.service` → `masked`  
 `systemctl is-enabled debug-shell.socket` → `masked`
